violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The gasket on one milk case was not in good repair, torn and shredded. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The non-food contact surfaces a milk case have an accumulation of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026
Ceiling tiles in the dry storage and dishwasher areas are pushed out of place. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Diced chicken was observed held at47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
The steam table was not in good repair, with one hot well nonfunctional. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026
Gasket on large milk case were observed in poor repair, torn and shredded. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the door handles on refrigerators and freezers have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
Ceiling tiles are missing or pushed aside in the dry storage and dishwasher areas. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The wall near the kitchen hand sink has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the prep table. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

Turkey bacon was observed thawing in a pan of stagnant water on the drainboard of the 3 bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024

The walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of tape/tape residue, soil residue and/or food debris. The floor in the dry storage area beneath shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The dishwasher is in poor repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. A work order has been submitted per Operations Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The door to the outside, located in the delivery area, is not tight-fitting, with a gap between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (numerous utensils in the clean storage drawer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All unclean items were taken to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

Salads and sandwiches were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

Dodecylbenzenesulfonic acid/lactic acid sanitizer solution was observed in excess of limits in the 3 bay sink. Sanitizers must be used according to directions on labels. Daily sanitizer logs are to be maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and urine observed on shelves in the dry storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

A wooden table with attached hutch in the food preparation area was not in good repair, with the front edge worn down and a crack exposed between layers of materials, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Table must be removed from the premised. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The steamer was not in good repair, still nonfunctional after 2 service repair calls per staff. Steamer must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in the dry storage room have an accumulation of rodent droppings & urine, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the oven especially around dials, and the table beneath the unused slicer have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

The floors in the dry storage area have an accumulation of dried spilled liquid and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

The hand washing sink in the food production/cooking area is in poor repair, with a nonfunctional hot water handle. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023
